artifact.description: CI/CD pipeline configuration for the payment service — includes build, test, security scan, and staged deployment to production

ai_assistance.description: Generated initial pipeline YAML from natural language description of deployment requirements and existing Dockerfile

decisions.description: Selected canary deployment strategy over AI-recommended blue-green deployment
decisions.context: Team operates a single Kubernetes cluster with limited node capacity. Blue-green requires 2x resources during deployment.

aiInputs.contribution: Recommended blue-green deployment for zero-downtime guarantees

decisions.rationale: Blue-green doubles resource requirements during deployment windows. Canary with automated rollback achieves comparable safety with 10% resource overhead. Cluster cannot sustain 2x capacity for the 15-minute deployment window.
